text.title: Tech-Debt Budget for Solos Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Tech-Debt Budget for Solos end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: inventory
step.action: Collect debt items; assign id; one-line title each.
step.decision-gate: Reject if list is empty in a non-greenfield codebase (you are missing items).

step.name: score
step.action: Score impact (1-5) and interest (1-5); reuse anchored examples in scoring rubric.

step.name: decide
step.action: Per item this cycle: decision in {ship, pay, monitor}; record rationale for any pay > 1 day.

step.name: allocate-with-cap
step.action: Sum paid-item cost; cap at 20% of cycle; if over, demote lowest impact * interest to monitor.

step.name: sign-off
step.action: Owner adds last_signed_utc; calendar-block next review (<=35 days).
step.decision-gate: Reject if last_signed_utc older than 35 days.
